title: Collapitalmod
description: A mod containing things for the Collapitalcraft modpack.
body:
A mod containing things for the [Collapitalcraft modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/collapitalcraft). Currently, this mod adds:
- Splash texts
- Replaces some textures with old ones
- Deepslate versions of old textures
- [Trofers](https://modrinth.com/mod/trofers) for quest rewards in the modpack
- Saddle recipe

All versions released after 0.5.11 have been released under the MIT License. All other versions are released with All Rights Reserved.
